title: Student Grade Point Averages
description: The information about grade point averages for a student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student grade point average.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student associated with the grade point averages.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

periodBased.title: Period Based
periodBased.description: The period based grade point averages for the student.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic period associated with the calculated grade point average.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

academicSource.title: Academic Source
academicSource.description: An indication of the academic sources that have been included in the grade point average (e.g. institution, transfer or all).
academicSource.x-lineageDerivedLogic: publish 'institution' if SHRTGPA_GPA_TYPE_IND = 'I' or 'transfer' if SHRTGPA_GPA_TYPE_IND = 'T' or 'all' if the periodBased object is included in the payload for the student (i.e. an SHRTGPA record exists), for each period/level published, also publish an 'all' source record - the values will not come from the SHRTGPA table though, instead they will be retrieved using the procedure P_COMB_TERM_GPA from the SHKCGPA package

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The academic level associated with the calculated grade point average.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

value.title: Value
value.x-lineageDerivedLogic: for the 'all' source report the COMB_GPA output from the P_COMB_TERM_GPA

attemptedCredits.title: Attempted Credits
attemptedCredits.description: The number of attempted credits used to compute the grade point average.
attemptedCredits.x-lineageDerivedLogic: for the 'all' source report the COMB_HOURS_ATTEMPTED output from the P_COMB_TERM_GPA

earnedCredits.title: Earned Credits
earnedCredits.description: The number of earned credits used to compute the grade point average.
earnedCredits.x-lineageDerivedLogic: for the 'all' source report the COMB_HOURS_EARNED output from the P_COMB_TERM_GPA

qualityPoints.title: Quality Points
qualityPoints.description: The number of quality points used to compute the grade point average.
qualityPoints.x-lineageDerivedLogic: for the 'all' source report the COMB_QUALITY_POINTS output from the P_COMB_TERM_GPA

gpaCredits.title: Grade Point Average Credits
gpaCredits.description: Number of GPA credits, as defined by the institution, used to compute the grade point average.
gpaCredits.x-lineageDerivedLogic: for the 'all' source report the COMB_GPA_HOURS output from the P_COMB_TERM_GPA

passedCredits.title: Passed Credits
passedCredits.description: Number of passed credits, as defined by the institution, used to compute the grade point average.
passedCredits.x-lineageDerivedLogic: for the 'all' source report the COMB_HOURS_PASSED output from the P_COMB_TERM_GPA

cumulative.title: Cumulative
cumulative.description: The cumulative grade point averages for the student.

academicSource.title: Academic Source
academicSource.description: An indication of the academic sources that have been included in the grade point average (e.g. institution, transfer or all).
academicSource.x-lineageDerivedLogic: publish 'institution' if SHRLGPA_GPA_TYPE_IND = 'I' or 'transfer' if SHRLGPA_GPA_TYPE_IND = 'T' or 'all' if SHRLGPA_GPA_TYPE_IND = 'O'"

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The academic level associated with the calculated grade point average.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

attemptedCredits.title: Attempted Credits
attemptedCredits.description: The number of attempted credits used to compute the grade point average.

earnedCredits.title: Earned Credits
earnedCredits.description: The number of earned credits used to compute the grade point average.

qualityPoints.title: Quality Points
qualityPoints.description: The number of quality points used to compute the grade point average.

gpaCredits.title: Grade Point Average Credits
gpaCredits.description: Number of GPA credits, as defined by the institution, used to compute the grade point average.

passedCredits.title: Passed Credits
passedCredits.description: Number of passed credits, as defined by the institution, used to compute the grade point average.

earnedDegrees.title: Earned Degrees
earnedDegrees.description: The grade point average of the student for earned degrees.

academicProgram.title: Academic Program
academicProgram.description: The academic program associated with the grade point average.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Program.
id.x-lineageDerivedLogic: where SHRDGMRS_PIDM = SHRDGMR_PIDM and SHRDGMRS_SEQ_NO = SHRDGMR_SEQ_NO AND SHRDGMR_SEQ_NO = SORLCUR_KEY_SEQNO AND SORLCUR_CACT_CODE is 'active' AND SORLCUR_CURRENT_CDE = Y AND SORLCUR_LMOD_CODE = OUTCOME (sb_curriculum_str.f_outcome) is the procedure used in stud-acad-program API

academicSource.title: Academic Source
academicSource.description: An indication of the academic sources that have been included in the grade point average (e.g. institution, transfer or all).
academicSource.x-lineageDerivedLogic: Use 'institution' if SHRDGMRS_INST_GPA or 'transfer' if SHRDGMRS_TRAN_GPA or 'all' if SHRDGMRS_OVER_GPA

earnedOn.title: Earned On
earnedOn.description: The date the student earned the degree.

value.title: Value
value.x-lineageDerivedLogic: P_DEGR_GPA.inst_gpa if academic source = 'institution' OR P_DEGR_GPA.tran_gpa if academic source = 'transfer' OR P_DEGR_GPA.over_gpa if academic source = 'all'

attemptedCredits.title: Attempted Credits
attemptedCredits.description: The number of attempted credits used to compute the grade point average.
attemptedCredits.x-lineageDerivedLogic: P_DEGR_GPA.inst_hours_attempted if academic source = 'institution' OR P_DEGR_GPA.tran_hours_attempted if academic source = 'transfer' OR P_DEGR_GPA.over_hours_attempted if academic source = 'all'

earnedCredits.title: Earned Credits
earnedCredits.description: The number of earned credits used to compute the grade point average.
earnedCredits.x-lineageDerivedLogic: P_DEGR_GPA.inst_hours_earned if academic source = 'institution' OR P_DEGR_GPA.tran_hours_earned if academic source = 'transfer' OR P_DEGR_GPA.over_hours_earned if academic source = 'all'

qualityPoints.title: Quality Points
qualityPoints.description: The number of quality points used to compute the grade point average.
qualityPoints.x-lineageDerivedLogic: P_DEGR_GPA.inst_quality_points if academic source = 'institution' OR P_DEGR_GPA.tran_quality_points if academic source = 'transfer' OR P_DEGR_GPA.over_quality_points if academic source = 'all'

gpaCredits.title: Grade Point Average Credits
gpaCredits.description: Number of GPA credits, as defined by the institution, used to compute the grade point average.
gpaCredits.x-lineageDerivedLogic: P_DEGR_GPA.inst_gpa_hours if academic source = 'institution' OR P_DEGR_GPA.tran_gpa_hours if academic source = 'transfer' OR P_DEGR_GPA.over_gpa_hours if academic source = 'all'

passedCredits.title: Passed Credits
passedCredits.description: Number of passed credits, as defined by the institution, used to compute the grade point average.
passedCredits.x-lineageDerivedLogic: P_DEGR_GPA.inst_hours_passed if academic source = 'institution' OR P_DEGR_GPA.tran_hours_passed if academic source = 'transfer' OR P_DEGR_GPA.over_hours_passed if academic source = 'all'
